case_number: Crl.Revision application is disposed of as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Rev. A. No.S- 36 of 2018. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of case. 12.10.2018. Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the applicant. Raja Imtiaz Ali Solangi, Assistant Prosecutor General. Mr. Ashiq Hussain Kalhoro Advocate for respondent No.2. ------------ At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press disposal of instant criminal revision application on merit, if the applicant is permitted to file a fresh complaint after change of “Fauti Khata” of the land under dispute. The proposal advanced by learned counsel for the applicant is not opposed by learned A.P.G and learned counsel for the private respondents. In view of above, the instant Crl.Revision application is disposed of as not pressed with permission to the applicant that subject to law he may file a fresh complaint before the Court having jurisdiction, after change of Fauti Khata of the land under dispute. J U D G E
